programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: Relive plays and moments from the career of Hall of Fame wide receiver Jerry Rice.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Relive the 2002 AFC Championship matchup between the Tennessee Titans and the Oakland Raiders where Tennessee found themselves unable to contend with a lethal Raiders passing attack led by Rich Gannon.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Tampa Bay defense sacked Aaron Rodgers five times, and a curious late call on fourth-and-goal by the Packers as Tom Brady and the Bucs beat top-seeded Green Bay 31-26 for the NFC Championship playoff game on Sunday.

programme.title: A Football Life
programme.desc: The feats of athleticism and football intelligence that made Rod Woodson one of the greatest defensive backs in football history are widely known.

programme.title: A Football Life
programme.desc: The unlikely rise of former Pittsburgh Steeler James Harrison from undrafted rookie to NFL Defensive Player of the Year and football's most feared linebacker.

programme.title: A Football Life
programme.desc: Tony Gonzalez described himself as the worst player on his youth football team, but he became the NFL's all-time leader in receptions and receiving yards by a tight end, and a first ballot Hall of Famer.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Charles Woodson helped Green Bay's defense, forcing two fumbles and picking off a pass by Tony Romo on the goal line in a 17-7 victory over the Dallas Cowboys.

programme.title: NFL Explained: Evolution of Free Agency
programme.sub-title: NFL Explained: Evolution of Free Agency
programme.desc: From early bidding wars to today's biggest contracts, a look back at how free agency has evolved throughout NFL history.

programme.title: A Football Life
programme.desc: One of the most exciting players of his generation, Michael Vick relives his rise, fall and long road to redemption.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Atlanta Falcons quarterback Matt Ryan threw a career-high four touchdown passes and the Atlanta Falcons rallied to beat the Philadelphia Eagles 35-31 after Michael Vick was knocked out with an injury late in the third quarter Sunday night.

programme.title: A Football Life
programme.desc: Profiling newly-enshrined Pro Football Hall of Famer Brett Favre, one of the most exciting quarterbacks in NFL history. Featuring his greatest highlights along with interviews with former players and coaches.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: The New Orleans Saints, the top offense in the league last year, had just enough in Thursday's opener against the Minnesota Vikings to take a 14-9 lead after three quarters.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: The New Orleans Saints, the top offense in the league last year, had just enough in Thursday's opener against the Minnesota Vikings to take a 14-9 lead after three quarters.

programme.title: NFL Highlights
programme.desc: Top plays from running back Saquon Barkley's career so far.

programme.title: NFL Highlights
programme.desc: Top plays from running back Saquon Barkley's career so far.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Saquon Barkley dashed through the snow for two touchdown runs and finished with 205 yards rushing, Jalen Hurts had a 44-yard scoring run and the Eagles held on against the turnover-happy Rams 28-22 on Sunday to reach the NFC championship game.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Saquon Barkley dashed through the snow for two touchdown runs and finished with 205 yards rushing, Jalen Hurts had a 44-yard scoring run and the Eagles held on against the turnover-happy Rams 28-22 on Sunday to reach the NFC championship game.

programme.title: A Football Life

programme.title: Super Bowl Classics
programme.sub-title: XXXIV: St. Louis Rams vs. Tennessee Titans
programme.desc: St. Louis Rams linebacker Mike Jones makes a game-saving tackle on the 1-yard line as time expires, preserving the Rams' first-ever Super Bowl title. From Jan. 30, 2000 at the Georgia Dome in Atlanta.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain how to master different lies on the course, featuring the buried lie, sitting up lie, and flyer lie.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain that the best play isn't always the hero shot. They demonstrate how save strokes by hitting over, under, and around trouble.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain how to save strokes by thinking around the course; they'll demonstrate how to take advantage of both sides of the tee-box and the importance of a good pre-shot routine.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Justin shares insight on his iconic golf swing and what it takes to stay on top your game.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Justin shares his best tips, drills, and instruction for a better short game.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Justin shares helpful putting tips and tricks.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris Como visits PING Headquarters in Phoenix and learns how PING uses technology to make the game simpler for all golfers. Also, meet the "PING Man" and go inside the labs where PING tests clubs and swings.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris Como spends a day with teaching legend Jim McLean for an in-depth look at his popular swing thoughts and his books. McLean also shares memories from his time with Arnold Palmer, Tiger Woods, and Carl Welty.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.sub-title: Martin Hall - How the Professor Teaches
programme.desc: Chris Como spends a day with "School of Golf" host Martin Hall in his natural habitat; how to visualize the golf swing; how the club path and face affect the swing; how to achieve an ideal impact position; how to find a safe go-to shot.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Multiple-time tour winner Bryson DeChambeau and his coach Chris Como give an inside look of a training session focusing on swing mechanics, the science of golf, and more.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris travels to Jupiter, Florida and learns from Jeff Leishman the importance of the transition and sequence in the swing. Leishman also shares drills that have helped top professionals improve their short game.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Follow Randall Hunt and Brianna Asman learn how to increase range of motion, add distance and play pain-free golf through a 90-day program of swing instruction.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.sub-title: Jake Knapp -- Trouble Shots & Par 5 Management
programme.desc: Jake Knapp analyzes par five shot management, covering tee shot techniques (lower trajectory, subtle fade), green slopes and putting speed.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Strategies for handling par fours, prioritizing smart decisions over power; evaluate the risk and reward of each shot, and learn specific techniques for tee shots and approaches.

programme.title: Golf VS
programme.desc: Dallas Stars center Tyler Seguin shares different shots that he uses on the ice, specifically the slapshot.

programme.title: Golf VS
programme.sub-title: Golf vs. Pole Vaulting -- Mando Duplantis
programme.desc: From the differences in sports training to the similarities, join Chris Como as he meets some of the world's best athletes to learn how they prepare and how their skills might translate to the golf course.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal competes against Lucy Robson on the Riverside course at Portstewart Golf Club in Northern Ireland.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Justin shares insight on his iconic golf swing and what it takes to stay on top your game.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Golf legend Annika Sorenstam shares her thought process and technique for shots around the green including pitches and chip shots.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Golf legend Annika Sorenstam shares her process for ball striking, from setup to in-swing fundamentals. Also, Annika demonstrates how to hit the driver longer or straighter based on the situation.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Annika Sorenstam discusses how she controlled her nerves to perform under pressure.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Eight-time PGA Tour winner and 2003 Masters Champion Mike Weir shows how he executes a variety of shots on and around the green. He demonstrates how to hit a bump and run, a high and soft chip, and how to play out of bad lies.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Eight-time PGA Tour winner and 2003 Masters champion Mike Weir shows how he executes a variety of shots on and around the green.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: PGA Tour winner and Masters Champion Mike Weir goes in depth on how he built and adapted his full swing throughout his career. He talks about everything from fundamentals all the way through how to hit some of the unique shots in golf.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: We catch up with former Big Break competitors Isaac Sanchez and Chad Pfeifer.Sanchez, who goes by the nickname "Sasquatch," is in actuality a gentle giant. But that didn't stop the competitor in him from creating some mythical moments.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.sub-title: Mallory Blackwelder, Julien Trudeau & Robbie Biershenk
programme.desc: They began as members of opposite teams on Big Break Ireland; Mallory Blackwelder and Julien Trudeau ended as the series' first married couple; in between, Mallory was a standout on Big Break NFL for Team Brown; meet the rest of their new team.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Sara Brown graced Golf Channel screens with strong runs at Big Break Sandals and Big Break Dominican Republic; she is running a family, occasionally herding preschoolers and being the ultimate team mom for her husband’s other successful squad.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.sub-title: Don Donatello & Stefanie Kenoyer; Al Del Greco
programme.desc: Don Donatello earned notoriety for his outbursts and antics, but quickly became heralded as a gritty competitor. Appearances on Big Break IV U.S. vs. Europe and Big Break Reunion solidified Donatello as legendary.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Golf legend Annika Sorenstam shares her process for ball striking, from setup to in-swing fundamentals. Also, Annika demonstrates how to hit the driver longer or straighter based on the situation.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.
